- No text or watermarks

generations.content_context: The project is explicitly positioning itself as the 'Linux of AI Agents', focusing on low-level extensibility rather than consumer-facing marketplaces. The discovery of memory rot defines a 90-day lifecycle limit for current RAG architectures, necessitating a shift toward active memory maintenance.
